data.content: [shipment_review 2026-03-12] Regression detected: test sync::apply::tests_invariant::apply_index_event_with_invariants_persists_them fails on main at merge commit 19ed01a. The test creates an index event without gate_data and the upsert silently fails to persist the hot knot record. make sanity exits with code 2. This was introduced by the knots-aa2c merge.
